Class OpenGLContext

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.AbstractRenderingContext
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.OpenGLContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, RenderingContext, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class OpenGLContext extends AbstractRenderingContext
An OpenGL rendering context bound to a GLFW window.

This context uses the GLFW window's OpenGL context for rendering.
